//: Deno-only toolchain: format, type-check and test with Deno's own bundled TypeScript. No npm, no registry installs. Browser code stays .js+JSDoc (no build step); dev tooling is .ts. `deno check` type-checks the whole shared core + tooling.

tasks.check: deno check shared/globals.d.ts shared/plan-core.js shared/plan.js shared/data.js shared/pop.js tests/lib.ts tests/validate.ts tests/stamp-sw.ts tests/syntax-check.ts tests/split-audio.ts tests/plan-core.test.ts
tasks.all: deno task fmt:check && deno task syntax && deno task validate && deno task test && deno task check
